criteria.description: agents/eval/ can load the Bitext dataset via task-3.5.1's loader through a common dataset-loader interface
agents/eval/ can load the Enron dataset via task-3.5.1's loader through a common dataset-loader interface
The interface used to load both is common/shared (single function, not per-dataset call sites)
covered_by: load_dataset() single entry point used by all parametrized cases

criteria.description: pytest agents/eval/test_dataset_interface.py: load both datasets through the common interface, assert consistent record shape
Unknown dataset name is a clear error, not a silent empty result
Do not reimplement task-3.5.1's loading logic -- delegate to data/load_bitext.py and data/load_enron.py unchanged
covered_by: code review: _load_bitext/_load_enron are pure pass-through delegations with no field-mapping logic of their own
impact-analysis.json: data/load_bitext.py and data/load_enron.py listed as unmodified dependencies

self_consistency_gate: agents/.venv/bin/pytest data/ agents/ingestion/ -q (regression check: existing loader tests + e2e smoke still pass/skip cleanly)
